TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Aniniay romi'ad i saway-Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a demak == I 1991 miheca 5 folad 1 romi'ad mihapiw to palasawad "Tongyin kanluan sici linsi tiaokuan", 5 folad 22 romi'ad mihapiw to palasawad "Cengci panluan tiaoli", 6 folad 3 romi'ad mihapiw to palasawad "Kanluan sici ciansu feitie tiaoli", toloay tatiihay rikec mapalasawad t oitiya. ​Nika i 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad cidemak ko "Misatatad to Tayw yofayof", caay ka pidoedo to toloay tatiihay rikec ko kalasawad. Tangasa i roma miheca 1992 miheca 5 folad 15 romi'ad, Lifayin kinatolo mihayda "Singfa" 100 liyad pisalofan i, nawhani pipalasawad to milimekay mirawraway raraw a satefoc, "Misatatad to Tayw yofayof" patiko mitomadaw, 7 folad 27 romi'ad polong noni a demak caayto tomadawen, tangasa "Misatatad to Tayw yofayof" kalalowadan no demak a mapalasawaday to. Tiaocaci patahtah sa miocor micomod toCinghua daykako ​I 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad, micomod i Tsinghua daykako ko dademakay no tiaocaci Fawopo, mirepet to mitiliday kingkiway to likisi ci Liaowicen. Toya romi'ad, papotalay tamdaw ci Cencenlan, Wangsiuhui, Masao Nikar (Lin Yinfo) a sasepat marepet. ​​Mapa'ilo cangra mikapot to i Dipongay Misatatad to Taywan a palowaday tamdaw ci Shi Ming a padafohan "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof", misa'osi to "Sepatay so'ot miheca likisi no Taywan" (Taiwan ren sibai nian shi) padama mirina', palilam to pisinting a tilid, o nano nisolapan no Tiawcaci. Ikor, citodongay pacipat to tikid ci An Cenkoang i 5 folad 11 romi'ad marepet, onini lalimaay o mifelihay to "Cenci panluan tiaoli" tosa ira ko cecay a ta'akay raraw o papatayen. Miliyang ko 'alomnay finawlan malisaot i Congcenmiaw ato syataw no Taypi ​Sakinian a pirepet a demak to Misatatad to Taywan yofayof tangsol sa mafa'owic ko finawlan no syakay, o kasakapotkapot no mitiliday i daykako masasicofel to sapiliyang, i'ayaw no 1 miheca (1990) 3 folad cidemak to Yipaihe mitiliday onto, o syakay a finawlan takaraw ko sakadademakaw. O mitiliday miketon i 5 folad 12 romi'ad patikol tayra i Congcenmiaw a malisaot miliyang, salongan mataelif ko semo'otay tamdaw miliyang, talacowa toya romi'ad tangsol sa malaplap no tayrin ato sofitay macolo' no paso, mapalafac, nika nanoyaan mangalef mangalef ko kalengat no finawlan micalap to Taypi syataw ko demak. ​​Toya 5 folad 13 romi'ad, o sapicokeraw to Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a demak, Cinghua daykako a dayhiw no mitiliday "Cinghua daykako haki anini miteka polong a paterep mitilid, todong piliyangan", sato ko pihapiw, oya 28 a hakasi no Cinghua daykako itiya to herek no lahok pasadak to "Pakoniraay ko pikingkiw, awaay ko raraw no harateng" sanay a paterep onto. Toya 5 folad 15 romi'ad, o nai polongay a kasaniyaro' a mitiliday, hakasi ato syakay onto a yofayof micalap to siyataw no Taypi, pasimirarakatay tamdaw pasifana' to "Palasawaden ko mifelihay tatiihay a rikec, milongoc pasadaken ko pakokotan, miliyang to mikari'angay a sici, mingodo to pakonira a pikingkiw" sanay 4 a misaakoan. Ikor, miliyangay a finawlan micalap to syataw no Taypi ira ko 6 romi'ad 5 ko dadaya. ​​​Itiya 5 folad 17 romi'ad, nawhani kareteng ko piorong to pilepi no finawlan ko Congko kmt, o Lifayin kinatolo nisa'osi mihayda palasawad to "Cengci panluan tiaoli" (Lifayin mihayda masiroma ko pihapiw), ca Liaowicen a lalima mapasadak to. I 5 folad 20 romi'ad, "Mafenekay tamdaw mifelih to kari'ang no sici a yofayof" palowad polong no finawlan "Mifelih t okohecalay katalawan ato kari'ang no sici" a pirakat, ca Liaowicen, Cencenlan, Wangsiuhui, Masao Nikar (Lin Yinfo) miawit to "Finawlan no Taywan cisalongoc mitelek to pakayraan no Taywan", mapolong mikapot to 'alomanay 'ofadan tamdaw a mirakat, nanoya oya itiraay miliyangay i Taypi syataw a finawlan miliyas to. Polong no pipalowad kaciraraw nai mifelihay raraw mafalic laloma'ay miraraway raraw ko pipararaw. ​Talacawa oya "Cengci panluan tiaoli" mapalasawaday to, nika polong no demak mafalic to pasi "Singfa" 100 liyad a telek: "Sapipelengaw to kitakit, micalap to sera no kitakit, ano eca o moraraway ko demak mifalic to kimpo no kitakit, mifelih to sifo, misatatas midemak i mapasetek ikakaay no 7 miheca ko demak, kakeridan i o awaayay ko romi'ad marofo. Mipatalaay ano eca minikiway raraw pa'ayaw a raraw, matefoc to ikakaay 6 miheca, laenoay no 5 miheca ko katefoc." ​​I 1991 miheca 12 folad 3 romi'ad, satakaraway hoyin no Taywan midotoc to "Singfa" 100 liyad saka 2 tosir misetak: Liaowicen awaay raraw, Ancenkong masetek 10 folad nayar to 3 miheca, Cencenlan, Wangsiuhui, Masao Nikar (Lin Yinfo) o mamipatala to sapirawraw a raraw masetek 3 miheca tangasa 1 miheca 6 folad. ​​Hakasi no likisi pacecay ci Couwanyao, o "Singfa" o nano nitelekan no Conghuaminko i 1935 miheca, o Taywan o Dipong ho ko mikowanay itiya, oya ROC o mi "parakatay ho to sician", onini a rikec tayni i Taywan caay ho kafalicen. Kafiyol no Misatatad to Taywan yofayof ​Ikor, mapalasawad to ko "Singfa" 100 liyad padoedo ho ko finawlan sapiliyang a demak. Tangasa roma miheca 1992 miheca 5 folad 15 romi'ad, Lifayin kinatolo mihayda to "Singfa" 100 kiyad a misalof, nawhani mapalasawad to koya misamawmaway mifelih a raraw a tefoc, oya "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a demak" mapatiko miliyaw mitomadaw, i 7 folad 27 romi'ad, nawhani ca Liaowicen a 5 tamdaw a nidemakan awaay ko piliyang toya nifalican a saka 100 liyad, polong no kaciraraw caay to ko laliclicen, tangasa anini oya "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a demak" a nilengatan a kasacofecofel a demak nanoya sa a paherek. ​​"Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a demak" saka kina 3 misa'osi mifalah no Lifayin, oya "Singfa" 100 liyad masalof to itiya saka 2 miheca mahayda, saka nikapolongan no Taywan o talolongay a kafiyol. Filomo: Saikoray mifelihay ciraraway ​"Saikoray mifelihay ciraraway" o nai sasepatay mitiliday no Cinghua daykako ko misasingay ato misanga'ay tonini a filomo, pakayni i nisowalan likisi ato matikiday a demak, mapasadak ko nano mafiyolay i 1991 mihecaan a "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a demak" a kacowat ato naikoray. ​​Onini a filomo miliyaw kasasowalen oya tatosaay a cidemakay, mikihatiyaay to maomahay onto a fafahiyan ci Wangsiuhui, ato yincumin ontoay ci Masao Nikar, o kacingangan nangra mato masimeday i syakay onto a tosaay finawlan, fafahiyan ato yincumin, o awaayay ko sapasowal salongoc itini lekakawa no kitakit, ano itini to i ontoan malawaay to a tamdaw. ​​​Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a demak pasowal sako citodongay ci Wangsiuhui: "Letek o nika'eca ka sinanot ako, kalaliyangan a tamdaw ato maliepahay mitamakoay a fafahiyan no Taywan saka, halafinay maepecay no misa'alingayay no mama a syakay, miliyasay to ramod a fafahiyan a pinangan o mamidotoc to kasinanot, nika caay padeteng sa mi'emet kako tonini, maolah mikihatiya to widawidang a matatawatawa, awaay katatiihan, nanay palisomad mili'ay ko widawidang ako i takowanan. === ​Mikawitay: Lincihong (Dademakay no Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay) ((編纂:林志鴻 ) ===
S.PHON: == aniniaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i sawaj-misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a ɬ~ɮəmak == i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miħapiw to~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮ "to~uŋjin kanɾo~u~uan siʦi ɾinsi tiao~uko~u~uan", * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miħapiw to~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮ "ʦəŋʦi panɾo~u~uan tiao~uɾi", * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miħapiw to~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮ "kanɾo~u~uan siʦi ʦianso~u~u fəitiə tiao~uɾi", to~uɾo~uaj tatiiħaj rikəʦ mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ t o~uitija. *nika i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦiɬ~ɮəmak ko~u "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajw jo~ufajo~uf", ʦaaj ka piɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u to~uɾo~uaj tatiiħaj rikəʦ ko~u kaɾasawaɬ~ɮ. taŋasa i ro~uma miħəʦa **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾifajin kinato~uɾo~u miħajɬ~ɮa "siŋfa" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ pisaɾo~ufan i, nawħani pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u miɾiməkaj mirawrawaj raraw a satəfo~uʦ, "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajw jo~ufajo~uf" patiko~u mito~umaɬ~ɮaw, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ po~uɾo~uŋ no~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak ʦaajto~u to~umaɬ~ɮawən, taŋasa "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajw jo~ufajo~uf" kaɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak a mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮaj to~u. tiao~uʦaʦi pataħtaħ sa mio~uʦo~ur miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~uʦiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u *i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj no~u tiao~uʦaʦi fawo~upo~u, mirəpət to~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj kiŋkiwaj to~u ɾikisi ʦi ɾiao~uwiʦən. to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, papo~utaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi ʦənʦənɾan, waŋsio~u~uħo~u~ui, masao~u nikar (ɾin jinfo~u) a sasəpat marəpət. **mapaʡiɾo~u ʦaŋra mikapo~ut to~u i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋaj misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi sħi miŋ a paɬ~ɮafo~uħan "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf", misaʡo~usi to~u "səpataj so~uʡo~ut miħəʦa ɾikisi no~u tajwan" (taiwan rən sib~b~vai nian sħi) paɬ~ɮama mirinaʡ, paɾiɾam to~u pisintiŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, o~u nano~u niso~uɾapan no~u tiawʦaʦi. iko~ur, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj paʦipat to~u tikiɬ~ɮ ʦi an ʦənko~uaŋ i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ marəpət, o~unini ɾaɾimaaj o~u mifəɾiħaj to~u "ʦənʦi panɾo~u~uan tiao~uɾi" to~usa ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a taʡakaj raraw o~u papatajən. miɾijaŋ ko~u ʡaɾo~umnaj finawɾan maɾisao~ut i ʦo~uŋʦənmiaw ato~u sjataw no~u tajpi *sakinian a pirəpət a ɬ~ɮəmak to~u misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf taŋso~uɾ sa mafaʡo~uwiʦ ko~u finawɾan no~u sjakaj, o~u kasakapo~utkapo~ut no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i ɬ~ɮajkako~u masasiʦo~ufəɾ to~u sapiɾijaŋ, iʡajaw no~u * miħəʦa (****) * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ʦiɬ~ɮəmak to~u jipaiħə mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj o~unto~u, o~u sjakaj a finawɾan takaraw ko~u sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaw. o~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj mikəto~un i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ patiko~uɾ tajra i ʦo~uŋʦənmiaw a maɾisao~ut miɾijaŋ, saɾo~uŋan mataəɾif ko~u səmo~uʡo~utaj tamɬ~ɮaw miɾijaŋ, taɾaʦo~uwa to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ taŋso~uɾ sa maɾapɾap no~u tajrin ato~u so~ufitaj maʦo~uɾo~uʡ no~u paso~u, mapaɾafaʦ, nika nano~ujaan maŋaɾəf maŋaɾəf ko~u kaɾəŋat no~u finawɾan miʦaɾap to~u tajpi sjataw ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak. **to~uja * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u sapiʦo~ukəraw to~u misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u a ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj "ʦiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u ħaki anini mitəka po~uɾo~uŋ a patərəp mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ piɾijaŋan", sato~u ko~u piħapiw, o~uja ** a ħakasi no~u ʦiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u itija to~u ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk pasaɬ~ɮak to~u "pako~uniraaj ko~u pikiŋkiw, awaaj ko~u raraw no~u ħaratəŋ" sanaj a patərəp o~unto~u. to~uja * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u nai po~uɾo~uŋaj a kasanijaro~uʡ a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, ħakasi ato~u sjakaj o~unto~u a jo~ufajo~uf miʦaɾap to~u sijataw no~u tajpi, pasimirarakataj tamɬ~ɮaw pasifanaʡ to~u "paɾasawaɬ~ɮən ko~u mifəɾiħaj tatiiħaj a rikəʦ, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ pasaɬ~ɮakən ko~u pako~uko~utan, miɾijaŋ to~u mikariʡaŋaj a siʦi, miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u pako~unira a pikiŋkiw" sanaj * a misaako~uan. iko~ur, miɾijaŋaj a finawɾan miʦaɾap to~u sjataw no~u tajpi ira ko~u * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja. ***itija * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, nawħani karətəŋ ko~u pio~uro~uŋ to~u piɾəpi no~u finawɾan ko~u ʦo~uŋko~u kmt, o~u ɾifajin kinato~uɾo~u nisaʡo~usi miħajɬ~ɮa paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "ʦəŋʦi panɾo~u~uan tiao~uɾi" (ɾifajin miħajɬ~ɮa masiro~uma ko~u piħapiw), ʦa ɾiao~uwiʦən a ɾaɾima mapasaɬ~ɮak to~u. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, "mafənəkaj tamɬ~ɮaw mifəɾiħ to~u kariʡaŋ no~u siʦi a jo~ufajo~uf" paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ po~uɾo~uŋ no~u finawɾan "mifəɾiħ t o~uko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan ato~u kariʡaŋ no~u siʦi" a pirakat, ʦa ɾiao~uwiʦən, ʦənʦənɾan, waŋsio~u~uħo~u~ui, masao~u nikar (ɾin jinfo~u) miawit to~u "finawɾan no~u tajwan ʦisaɾo~uŋo~uʦ mitəɾək to~u pakajraan no~u tajwan", mapo~uɾo~uŋ mikapo~ut to~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮan tamɬ~ɮaw a mirakat, nano~uja o~uja itiraaj miɾijaŋaj i tajpi sjataw a finawɾan miɾijas to~u. po~uɾo~uŋ no~u pipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ kaʦiraraw nai mifəɾiħaj raraw mafaɾiʦ ɾaɾo~umaʡaj mirarawaj raraw ko~u pipararaw. *taɾaʦawa o~uja "ʦəŋʦi panɾo~u~uan tiao~uɾi" mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮaj to~u, nika po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak mafaɾiʦ to~u pasi "siŋfa" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ a təɾək: "sapipəɾəŋaw to~u kitakit, miʦaɾap to~u səra no~u kitakit, ano~u əʦa o~u mo~urarawaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak mifaɾiʦ to~u kimpo~u no~u kitakit, mifəɾiħ to~u sifo~u, misatatas miɬ~ɮəmak i mapasətək ikakaaj no~u * miħəʦa ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, kakəriɬ~ɮan i o~u awaajaj ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maro~ufo~u. mipataɾaaj ano~u əʦa minikiwaj raraw paʡajaw a raraw, matəfo~uʦ to~u ikakaaj * miħəʦa, ɾaəno~uaj no~u * miħəʦa ko~u katəfo~uʦ." **i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, satakarawaj ħo~ujin no~u tajwan miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u "siŋfa" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ saka * to~usir misətak: ɾiao~uwiʦən awaaj raraw, anʦənko~uŋ masətək ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ najar to~u * miħəʦa, ʦənʦənɾan, waŋsio~u~uħo~u~ui, masao~u nikar (ɾin jinfo~u) o~u mamipataɾa to~u sapirawraw a raraw masətək * miħəʦa taŋasa * miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ. **ħakasi no~u ɾikisi paʦəʦaj ʦi ʦo~uo~u~uwanjao~u, o~u "siŋfa" o~u nano~u nitəɾəkan no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u i **** miħəʦa, o~u tajwan o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ħo~u ko~u miko~uwanaj itija, o~uja ro~uʦ o~u mi "parakataj ħo~u to~u siʦian", o~unini a rikəʦ tajni i tajwan ʦaaj ħo~u kafaɾiʦən. kafijo~uɾ no~u misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf *iko~ur, mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u "siŋfa" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u ħo~u ko~u finawɾan sapiɾijaŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak. taŋasa ro~uma miħəʦa **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾifajin kinato~uɾo~u miħajɬ~ɮa to~u "siŋfa" *** kijaɬ~ɮ a misaɾo~uf, nawħani mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~uja misamawmawaj mifəɾiħ a raraw a təfo~uʦ, o~uja "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a ɬ~ɮəmak" mapatiko~u miɾijaw mito~umaɬ~ɮaw, i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, nawħani ʦa ɾiao~uwiʦən a * tamɬ~ɮaw a niɬ~ɮəmakan awaaj ko~u piɾijaŋ to~uja nifaɾiʦan a saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kaʦiraraw ʦaaj to~u ko~u ɾaɾiʦɾiʦən, taŋasa anini o~uja "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a ɬ~ɮəmak" a niɾəŋatan a kasaʦo~ufəʦo~ufəɾ a ɬ~ɮəmak nano~uja sa a paħərək. **"misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a ɬ~ɮəmak" saka kina * misaʡo~usi mifaɾaħ no~u ɾifajin, o~uja "siŋfa" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ masaɾo~uf to~u itija saka * miħəʦa maħajɬ~ɮa, saka nikapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u tajwan o~u taɾo~uɾo~uŋaj a kafijo~uɾ. fiɾo~umo~u: saiko~uraj mifəɾiħaj ʦirarawaj *"saiko~uraj mifəɾiħaj ʦirarawaj" o~u nai sasəpataj mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u ʦiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u ko~u misasiŋaj ato~u misaŋaʡaj to~unini a fiɾo~umo~u, pakajni i niso~uwaɾan ɾikisi ato~u matikiɬ~ɮaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, mapasaɬ~ɮak ko~u nano~u mafijo~uɾaj i **** miħəʦaan a "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a ɬ~ɮəmak" a kaʦo~uwat ato~u naiko~uraj. **o~unini a fiɾo~umo~u miɾijaw kasaso~uwaɾən o~uja tato~usaaj a ʦiɬ~ɮəmakaj, mikiħatijaaj to~u mao~umaħaj o~unto~u a fafaħijan ʦi waŋsio~u~uħo~u~ui, ato~u jinʦo~u~umin o~unto~uaj ʦi masao~u nikar, o~u kaʦiŋaŋan naŋra mato~u masiməɬ~ɮaj i sjakaj o~unto~u a to~usaaj finawɾan, fafaħijan ato~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~u awaajaj ko~u sapaso~uwaɾ saɾo~uŋo~uʦ itini ɾəkakawa no~u kitakit, ano~u itini to~u i o~unto~uan maɾawaaj to~u a tamɬ~ɮaw. ***misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a ɬ~ɮəmak paso~uwaɾ sako~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ʦi waŋsio~u~uħo~u~ui: "ɾətək o~u nikaʡəʦa ka sinano~ut ako~u, kaɾaɾijaŋan a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u maɾiəpaħaj mitamako~uaj a fafaħijan no~u tajwan saka, ħaɾafinaj maəpəʦaj no~u misaʡaɾiŋajaj no~u mama a sjakaj, miɾijasaj to~u ramo~uɬ~ɮ a fafaħijan a pinaŋan o~u mamiɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u kasinano~ut, nika ʦaaj paɬ~ɮətəŋ sa miʡəmət kako~u to~unini, mao~uɾaħ mikiħatija to~u wiɬ~ɮawiɬ~ɮaŋ a matatawatawa, awaaj katatiiħan, nanaj paɾiso~umaɬ~ɮ miɾiʡaj ko~u wiɬ~ɮawiɬ~ɮaŋ ako~u i tako~uwanan. === *mikawitaj: ɾinʦiħo~uŋ (ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj no~u sin tajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj) ((**:*** ) ===
S.FORM: == Aniniay romi'ad i saway-Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a demak == I 1991 miheca 5 folad 1 romi'ad mihapiw to palasawad "Tongyin kanluan sici linsi tiaokuan", 5 folad 22 romi'ad mihapiw to palasawad "Cengci panluan tiaoli", 6 folad 3 romi'ad mihapiw to palasawad "Kanluan sici ciansu feitie tiaoli", toloay tatiihay rikec mapalasawad t oitiya. ​Nika i 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad cidemak ko "Misatatad to Tayw yofayof", caay ka pidoedo to toloay tatiihay rikec ko kalasawad. Tangasa i roma miheca 1992 miheca 5 folad 15 romi'ad, Lifayin kinatolo mihayda "Singfa" 100 liyad pisalofan i, nawhani pipalasawad to milimekay mirawraway raraw a satefoc, "Misatatad to Tayw yofayof" patiko mitomadaw, 7 folad 27 romi'ad polong noni a demak caayto tomadawen, tangasa "Misatatad to Tayw yofayof" kalalowadan no demak a mapalasawaday to. Tiaocaci patahtah sa miocor micomod toCinghua daykako ​I 1991 miheca 5 folad 9 romi'ad, micomod i Tsinghua daykako ko dademakay no tiaocaci Fawopo, mirepet to mitiliday kingkiway to likisi ci Liaowicen. Toya romi'ad, papotalay tamdaw ci Cencenlan, Wangsiuhui, Masao Nikar (Lin Yinfo) a sasepat marepet. ​​Mapa'ilo cangra mikapot to i Dipongay Misatatad to Taywan a palowaday tamdaw ci Shi Ming a padafohan "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof", misa'osi to "Sepatay so'ot miheca likisi no Taywan" (Taiwan ren sibai nian shi) padama mirina', palilam to pisinting a tilid, o nano nisolapan no Tiawcaci. Ikor, citodongay pacipat to tikid ci An Cenkoang i 5 folad 11 romi'ad marepet, onini lalimaay o mifelihay to "Cenci panluan tiaoli" tosa ira ko cecay a ta'akay raraw o papatayen. Miliyang ko 'alomnay finawlan malisaot i Congcenmiaw ato syataw no Taypi ​Sakinian a pirepet a demak to Misatatad to Taywan yofayof tangsol sa mafa'owic ko finawlan no syakay, o kasakapotkapot no mitiliday i daykako masasicofel to sapiliyang, i'ayaw no 1 miheca (1990) 3 folad cidemak to Yipaihe mitiliday onto, o syakay a finawlan takaraw ko sakadademakaw. O mitiliday miketon i 5 folad 12 romi'ad patikol tayra i Congcenmiaw a malisaot miliyang, salongan mataelif ko semo'otay tamdaw miliyang, talacowa toya romi'ad tangsol sa malaplap no tayrin ato sofitay macolo' no paso, mapalafac, nika nanoyaan mangalef mangalef ko kalengat no finawlan micalap to Taypi syataw ko demak. ​​Toya 5 folad 13 romi'ad, o sapicokeraw to Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a demak, Cinghua daykako a dayhiw no mitiliday "Cinghua daykako haki anini miteka polong a paterep mitilid, todong piliyangan", sato ko pihapiw, oya 28 a hakasi no Cinghua daykako itiya to herek no lahok pasadak to "Pakoniraay ko pikingkiw, awaay ko raraw no harateng" sanay a paterep onto. Toya 5 folad 15 romi'ad, o nai polongay a kasaniyaro' a mitiliday, hakasi ato syakay onto a yofayof micalap to siyataw no Taypi, pasimirarakatay tamdaw pasifana' to "Palasawaden ko mifelihay tatiihay a rikec, milongoc pasadaken ko pakokotan, miliyang to mikari'angay a sici, mingodo to pakonira a pikingkiw" sanay 4 a misaakoan. Ikor, miliyangay a finawlan micalap to syataw no Taypi ira ko 6 romi'ad 5 ko dadaya. ​​​Itiya 5 folad 17 romi'ad, nawhani kareteng ko piorong to pilepi no finawlan ko Congko kmt, o Lifayin kinatolo nisa'osi mihayda palasawad to "Cengci panluan tiaoli" (Lifayin mihayda masiroma ko pihapiw), ca Liaowicen a lalima mapasadak to. I 5 folad 20 romi'ad, "Mafenekay tamdaw mifelih to kari'ang no sici a yofayof" palowad polong no finawlan "Mifelih t okohecalay katalawan ato kari'ang no sici" a pirakat, ca Liaowicen, Cencenlan, Wangsiuhui, Masao Nikar (Lin Yinfo) miawit to "Finawlan no Taywan cisalongoc mitelek to pakayraan no Taywan", mapolong mikapot to 'alomanay 'ofadan tamdaw a mirakat, nanoya oya itiraay miliyangay i Taypi syataw a finawlan miliyas to. Polong no pipalowad kaciraraw nai mifelihay raraw mafalic laloma'ay miraraway raraw ko pipararaw. ​Talacawa oya "Cengci panluan tiaoli" mapalasawaday to, nika polong no demak mafalic to pasi "Singfa" 100 liyad a telek: "Sapipelengaw to kitakit, micalap to sera no kitakit, ano eca o moraraway ko demak mifalic to kimpo no kitakit, mifelih to sifo, misatatas midemak i mapasetek ikakaay no 7 miheca ko demak, kakeridan i o awaayay ko romi'ad marofo. Mipatalaay ano eca minikiway raraw pa'ayaw a raraw, matefoc to ikakaay 6 miheca, laenoay no 5 miheca ko katefoc." ​​I 1991 miheca 12 folad 3 romi'ad, satakaraway hoyin no Taywan midotoc to "Singfa" 100 liyad saka 2 tosir misetak: Liaowicen awaay raraw, Ancenkong masetek 10 folad nayar to 3 miheca, Cencenlan, Wangsiuhui, Masao Nikar (Lin Yinfo) o mamipatala to sapirawraw a raraw masetek 3 miheca tangasa 1 miheca 6 folad. ​​Hakasi no likisi pacecay ci Couwanyao, o "Singfa" o nano nitelekan no Conghuaminko i 1935 miheca, o Taywan o Dipong ho ko mikowanay itiya, oya ROC o mi "parakatay ho to sician", onini a rikec tayni i Taywan caay ho kafalicen. Kafiyol no Misatatad to Taywan yofayof ​Ikor, mapalasawad to ko "Singfa" 100 liyad padoedo ho ko finawlan sapiliyang a demak. Tangasa roma miheca 1992 miheca 5 folad 15 romi'ad, Lifayin kinatolo mihayda to "Singfa" 100 kiyad a misalof, nawhani mapalasawad to koya misamawmaway mifelih a raraw a tefoc, oya "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a demak" mapatiko miliyaw mitomadaw, i 7 folad 27 romi'ad, nawhani ca Liaowicen a 5 tamdaw a nidemakan awaay ko piliyang toya nifalican a saka 100 liyad, polong no kaciraraw caay to ko laliclicen, tangasa anini oya "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a demak" a nilengatan a kasacofecofel a demak nanoya sa a paherek. ​​"Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a demak" saka kina 3 misa'osi mifalah no Lifayin, oya "Singfa" 100 liyad masalof to itiya saka 2 miheca mahayda, saka nikapolongan no Taywan o talolongay a kafiyol. Filomo: Saikoray mifelihay ciraraway ​"Saikoray mifelihay ciraraway" o nai sasepatay mitiliday no Cinghua daykako ko misasingay ato misanga'ay tonini a filomo, pakayni i nisowalan likisi ato matikiday a demak, mapasadak ko nano mafiyolay i 1991 mihecaan a "Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a demak" a kacowat ato naikoray. ​​Onini a filomo miliyaw kasasowalen oya tatosaay a cidemakay, mikihatiyaay to maomahay onto a fafahiyan ci Wangsiuhui, ato yincumin ontoay ci Masao Nikar, o kacingangan nangra mato masimeday i syakay onto a tosaay finawlan, fafahiyan ato yincumin, o awaayay ko sapasowal salongoc itini lekakawa no kitakit, ano itini to i ontoan malawaay to a tamdaw. ​​​Misatatad to Taywan yofayof a demak pasowal sako citodongay ci Wangsiuhui: "Letek o nika'eca ka sinanot ako, kalaliyangan a tamdaw ato maliepahay mitamakoay a fafahiyan no Taywan saka, halafinay maepecay no misa'alingayay no mama a syakay, miliyasay to ramod a fafahiyan a pinangan o mamidotoc to kasinanot, nika caay padeteng sa mi'emet kako tonini, maolah mikihatiya to widawidang a matatawatawa, awaay katatiihan, nanay palisomad mili'ay ko widawidang ako i takowanan. === ​Mikawitay: Lincihong (Dademakay no Sin Taywan hepin kikingkay) ((編纂:林志鴻 ) ===
S.PHON: == aniniaj ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ i sawaj-misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a ɬ~ɮəmak == i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miħapiw to~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮ "to~uŋjin kanɾo~u~uan siʦi ɾinsi tiao~uko~u~uan", * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miħapiw to~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮ "ʦəŋʦi panɾo~u~uan tiao~uɾi", * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ miħapiw to~u paɾasawaɬ~ɮ "kanɾo~u~uan siʦi ʦianso~u~u fəitiə tiao~uɾi", to~uɾo~uaj tatiiħaj rikəʦ mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ t o~uitija. *nika i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ʦiɬ~ɮəmak ko~u "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajw jo~ufajo~uf", ʦaaj ka piɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u to~u to~uɾo~uaj tatiiħaj rikəʦ ko~u kaɾasawaɬ~ɮ. taŋasa i ro~uma miħəʦa **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾifajin kinato~uɾo~u miħajɬ~ɮa "siŋfa" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ pisaɾo~ufan i, nawħani pipaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u miɾiməkaj mirawrawaj raraw a satəfo~uʦ, "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajw jo~ufajo~uf" patiko~u mito~umaɬ~ɮaw, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ po~uɾo~uŋ no~uni a ɬ~ɮəmak ʦaajto~u to~umaɬ~ɮawən, taŋasa "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajw jo~ufajo~uf" kaɾaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮan no~u ɬ~ɮəmak a mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮaj to~u. tiao~uʦaʦi pataħtaħ sa mio~uʦo~ur miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ to~uʦiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u *i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮ i tsiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj no~u tiao~uʦaʦi fawo~upo~u, mirəpət to~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj kiŋkiwaj to~u ɾikisi ʦi ɾiao~uwiʦən. to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, papo~utaɾaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi ʦənʦənɾan, waŋsio~u~uħo~u~ui, masao~u nikar (ɾin jinfo~u) a sasəpat marəpət. **mapaʡiɾo~u ʦaŋra mikapo~ut to~u i ɬ~ɮipo~uŋaj misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan a paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮaj tamɬ~ɮaw ʦi sħi miŋ a paɬ~ɮafo~uħan "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf", misaʡo~usi to~u "səpataj so~uʡo~ut miħəʦa ɾikisi no~u tajwan" (taiwan rən sib~b~vai nian sħi) paɬ~ɮama mirinaʡ, paɾiɾam to~u pisintiŋ a tiɾiɬ~ɮ, o~u nano~u niso~uɾapan no~u tiawʦaʦi. iko~ur, ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj paʦipat to~u tikiɬ~ɮ ʦi an ʦənko~uaŋ i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ marəpət, o~unini ɾaɾimaaj o~u mifəɾiħaj to~u "ʦənʦi panɾo~u~uan tiao~uɾi" to~usa ira ko~u ʦəʦaj a taʡakaj raraw o~u papatajən. miɾijaŋ ko~u ʡaɾo~umnaj finawɾan maɾisao~ut i ʦo~uŋʦənmiaw ato~u sjataw no~u tajpi *sakinian a pirəpət a ɬ~ɮəmak to~u misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf taŋso~uɾ sa mafaʡo~uwiʦ ko~u finawɾan no~u sjakaj, o~u kasakapo~utkapo~ut no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj i ɬ~ɮajkako~u masasiʦo~ufəɾ to~u sapiɾijaŋ, iʡajaw no~u * miħəʦa (****) * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ʦiɬ~ɮəmak to~u jipaiħə mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj o~unto~u, o~u sjakaj a finawɾan takaraw ko~u sakaɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaw. o~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj mikəto~un i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ patiko~uɾ tajra i ʦo~uŋʦənmiaw a maɾisao~ut miɾijaŋ, saɾo~uŋan mataəɾif ko~u səmo~uʡo~utaj tamɬ~ɮaw miɾijaŋ, taɾaʦo~uwa to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ taŋso~uɾ sa maɾapɾap no~u tajrin ato~u so~ufitaj maʦo~uɾo~uʡ no~u paso~u, mapaɾafaʦ, nika nano~ujaan maŋaɾəf maŋaɾəf ko~u kaɾəŋat no~u finawɾan miʦaɾap to~u tajpi sjataw ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak. **to~uja * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u sapiʦo~ukəraw to~u misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a ɬ~ɮəmak, ʦiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u a ɬ~ɮajħiw no~u mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj "ʦiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u ħaki anini mitəka po~uɾo~uŋ a patərəp mitiɾiɬ~ɮ, to~uɬ~ɮo~uŋ piɾijaŋan", sato~u ko~u piħapiw, o~uja ** a ħakasi no~u ʦiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u itija to~u ħərək no~u ɾaħo~uk pasaɬ~ɮak to~u "pako~uniraaj ko~u pikiŋkiw, awaaj ko~u raraw no~u ħaratəŋ" sanaj a patərəp o~unto~u. to~uja * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u nai po~uɾo~uŋaj a kasanijaro~uʡ a mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj, ħakasi ato~u sjakaj o~unto~u a jo~ufajo~uf miʦaɾap to~u sijataw no~u tajpi, pasimirarakataj tamɬ~ɮaw pasifanaʡ to~u "paɾasawaɬ~ɮən ko~u mifəɾiħaj tatiiħaj a rikəʦ, miɾo~uŋo~uʦ pasaɬ~ɮakən ko~u pako~uko~utan, miɾijaŋ to~u mikariʡaŋaj a siʦi, miŋo~uɬ~ɮo~u to~u pako~unira a pikiŋkiw" sanaj * a misaako~uan. iko~ur, miɾijaŋaj a finawɾan miʦaɾap to~u sjataw no~u tajpi ira ko~u * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ * ko~u ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaja. ***itija * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, nawħani karətəŋ ko~u pio~uro~uŋ to~u piɾəpi no~u finawɾan ko~u ʦo~uŋko~u kmt, o~u ɾifajin kinato~uɾo~u nisaʡo~usi miħajɬ~ɮa paɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u "ʦəŋʦi panɾo~u~uan tiao~uɾi" (ɾifajin miħajɬ~ɮa masiro~uma ko~u piħapiw), ʦa ɾiao~uwiʦən a ɾaɾima mapasaɬ~ɮak to~u. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, "mafənəkaj tamɬ~ɮaw mifəɾiħ to~u kariʡaŋ no~u siʦi a jo~ufajo~uf" paɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ po~uɾo~uŋ no~u finawɾan "mifəɾiħ t o~uko~uħəʦaɾaj kataɾawan ato~u kariʡaŋ no~u siʦi" a pirakat, ʦa ɾiao~uwiʦən, ʦənʦənɾan, waŋsio~u~uħo~u~ui, masao~u nikar (ɾin jinfo~u) miawit to~u "finawɾan no~u tajwan ʦisaɾo~uŋo~uʦ mitəɾək to~u pakajraan no~u tajwan", mapo~uɾo~uŋ mikapo~ut to~u ʡaɾo~umanaj ʡo~ufaɬ~ɮan tamɬ~ɮaw a mirakat, nano~uja o~uja itiraaj miɾijaŋaj i tajpi sjataw a finawɾan miɾijas to~u. po~uɾo~uŋ no~u pipaɾo~uwaɬ~ɮ kaʦiraraw nai mifəɾiħaj raraw mafaɾiʦ ɾaɾo~umaʡaj mirarawaj raraw ko~u pipararaw. *taɾaʦawa o~uja "ʦəŋʦi panɾo~u~uan tiao~uɾi" mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮaj to~u, nika po~uɾo~uŋ no~u ɬ~ɮəmak mafaɾiʦ to~u pasi "siŋfa" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ a təɾək: "sapipəɾəŋaw to~u kitakit, miʦaɾap to~u səra no~u kitakit, ano~u əʦa o~u mo~urarawaj ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak mifaɾiʦ to~u kimpo~u no~u kitakit, mifəɾiħ to~u sifo~u, misatatas miɬ~ɮəmak i mapasətək ikakaaj no~u * miħəʦa ko~u ɬ~ɮəmak, kakəriɬ~ɮan i o~u awaajaj ko~u ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ maro~ufo~u. mipataɾaaj ano~u əʦa minikiwaj raraw paʡajaw a raraw, matəfo~uʦ to~u ikakaaj * miħəʦa, ɾaəno~uaj no~u * miħəʦa ko~u katəfo~uʦ." **i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, satakarawaj ħo~ujin no~u tajwan miɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u "siŋfa" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ saka * to~usir misətak: ɾiao~uwiʦən awaaj raraw, anʦənko~uŋ masətək ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ najar to~u * miħəʦa, ʦənʦənɾan, waŋsio~u~uħo~u~ui, masao~u nikar (ɾin jinfo~u) o~u mamipataɾa to~u sapirawraw a raraw masətək * miħəʦa taŋasa * miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ. **ħakasi no~u ɾikisi paʦəʦaj ʦi ʦo~uo~u~uwanjao~u, o~u "siŋfa" o~u nano~u nitəɾəkan no~u ʦo~uŋħo~u~uaminko~u i **** miħəʦa, o~u tajwan o~u ɬ~ɮipo~uŋ ħo~u ko~u miko~uwanaj itija, o~uja ro~uʦ o~u mi "parakataj ħo~u to~u siʦian", o~unini a rikəʦ tajni i tajwan ʦaaj ħo~u kafaɾiʦən. kafijo~uɾ no~u misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf *iko~ur, mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u "siŋfa" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u ħo~u ko~u finawɾan sapiɾijaŋ a ɬ~ɮəmak. taŋasa ro~uma miħəʦa **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, ɾifajin kinato~uɾo~u miħajɬ~ɮa to~u "siŋfa" *** kijaɬ~ɮ a misaɾo~uf, nawħani mapaɾasawaɬ~ɮ to~u ko~uja misamawmawaj mifəɾiħ a raraw a təfo~uʦ, o~uja "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a ɬ~ɮəmak" mapatiko~u miɾijaw mito~umaɬ~ɮaw, i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, nawħani ʦa ɾiao~uwiʦən a * tamɬ~ɮaw a niɬ~ɮəmakan awaaj ko~u piɾijaŋ to~uja nifaɾiʦan a saka *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ, po~uɾo~uŋ no~u kaʦiraraw ʦaaj to~u ko~u ɾaɾiʦɾiʦən, taŋasa anini o~uja "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a ɬ~ɮəmak" a niɾəŋatan a kasaʦo~ufəʦo~ufəɾ a ɬ~ɮəmak nano~uja sa a paħərək. **"misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a ɬ~ɮəmak" saka kina * misaʡo~usi mifaɾaħ no~u ɾifajin, o~uja "siŋfa" *** ɾijaɬ~ɮ masaɾo~uf to~u itija saka * miħəʦa maħajɬ~ɮa, saka nikapo~uɾo~uŋan no~u tajwan o~u taɾo~uɾo~uŋaj a kafijo~uɾ. fiɾo~umo~u: saiko~uraj mifəɾiħaj ʦirarawaj *"saiko~uraj mifəɾiħaj ʦirarawaj" o~u nai sasəpataj mitiɾiɬ~ɮaj no~u ʦiŋħo~u~ua ɬ~ɮajkako~u ko~u misasiŋaj ato~u misaŋaʡaj to~unini a fiɾo~umo~u, pakajni i niso~uwaɾan ɾikisi ato~u matikiɬ~ɮaj a ɬ~ɮəmak, mapasaɬ~ɮak ko~u nano~u mafijo~uɾaj i **** miħəʦaan a "misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a ɬ~ɮəmak" a kaʦo~uwat ato~u naiko~uraj. **o~unini a fiɾo~umo~u miɾijaw kasaso~uwaɾən o~uja tato~usaaj a ʦiɬ~ɮəmakaj, mikiħatijaaj to~u mao~umaħaj o~unto~u a fafaħijan ʦi waŋsio~u~uħo~u~ui, ato~u jinʦo~u~umin o~unto~uaj ʦi masao~u nikar, o~u kaʦiŋaŋan naŋra mato~u masiməɬ~ɮaj i sjakaj o~unto~u a to~usaaj finawɾan, fafaħijan ato~u jinʦo~u~umin, o~u awaajaj ko~u sapaso~uwaɾ saɾo~uŋo~uʦ itini ɾəkakawa no~u kitakit, ano~u itini to~u i o~unto~uan maɾawaaj to~u a tamɬ~ɮaw. ***misatataɬ~ɮ to~u tajwan jo~ufajo~uf a ɬ~ɮəmak paso~uwaɾ sako~u ʦito~uɬ~ɮo~uŋaj ʦi waŋsio~u~uħo~u~ui: "ɾətək o~u nikaʡəʦa ka sinano~ut ako~u, kaɾaɾijaŋan a tamɬ~ɮaw ato~u maɾiəpaħaj mitamako~uaj a fafaħijan no~u tajwan saka, ħaɾafinaj maəpəʦaj no~u misaʡaɾiŋajaj no~u mama a sjakaj, miɾijasaj to~u ramo~uɬ~ɮ a fafaħijan a pinaŋan o~u mamiɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦ to~u kasinano~ut, nika ʦaaj paɬ~ɮətəŋ sa miʡəmət kako~u to~unini, mao~uɾaħ mikiħatija to~u wiɬ~ɮawiɬ~ɮaŋ a matatawatawa, awaaj katatiiħan, nanaj paɾiso~umaɬ~ɮ miɾiʡaj ko~u wiɬ~ɮawiɬ~ɮaŋ ako~u i tako~uwanan. === *mikawitaj: ɾinʦiħo~uŋ (ɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮəmakaj no~u sin tajwan ħəpin kikiŋkaj) ((**:*** ) ===
